items.title: Build Fully Onchain Perps on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of fully on-chain perpetual contracts on Solana could enhance trading efficiency and attract more liquidity to the ecosystem.

items.title: Solana crosses 200K tokenized stock holders – Here’s why the timing matters!
items.whyYouShouldCare: Reaching over 200,000 tokenized stock holders indicates growing adoption and could bolster Solana's reputation as a viable platform for asset tokenization.

items.title: Kalshi Eyes Perpetual Futures for XRP, Solana, Dogecoin—And These Altcoins
items.whyYouShouldCare: Kalshi's interest in launching perpetual futures for Solana alongside other altcoins could increase market participation and diversify trading options within the Solana ecosystem.
